name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together the butter, sugar, and vanilla in a bowl until fluffy.
3. Add the egg and blend well.
4. Combine the flour and baking powder, then blend into the butter mixture.
5. Add the chocolate chips, almonds, and grated orange peel.
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a greased cookie sheet, at least 1 1/2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes until lightly brown and crisp.
8. Allow cookies to cool for one minute before removing from the oven.
9. Transfer cookies to a wire rack.
